name: Diane Schuur
abstract: Diane Joan Schuur (born December 10, 1953), nicknamed "Deedles", is an American jazz singer and pianist. As of 2015, Schuur had released 23 albums, and had extended her jazz repertoire to include essences of Latin, gospel, pop and country music.

about_quotes.speaker: Mandel Johnny
about_quotes.evidence: So you did that, you did part of an album with Diane Schuur, some of those arrangements. Yeah, I just done a bunch of stuff.
